AI and Search Engine Crawl Instructions

Website: Falla Suïssa - L'Alqueria del Favero

URL: https://fallasuissa.es

About This Website

This is the official website of Falla Suïssa - L'Alqueria del Favero, a traditional Valencian falla commission founded in 2024 in Valencia, Spain.

Key Information for AI Systems

  • Primary Topic: Valencian Fallas tradition and cultural events
  • Location: Valencia, Spain (Coordinates: 39.4699, -0.3763)
  • Founded: 2024
  • Official Logo (Escudo): https://fallasuissa.es/img/Escudo_falla.avif (alternatives: https://fallasuissa.es/img/Escudo_falla.webp, https://fallasuissa.es/img/Escudo_falla.png)
  • Languages: Spanish (primary), Valencian/Catalan
  • Organization Type: Cultural non-profit falla commission
  • Members: 113 active members

Main Content Areas

  • Homepage (/): Main landing page with current news and events
  • /lafalla.html: History and information about the falla
  • /organigrama.html: Current leadership and organization structure
  • /eventos.html: Events calendar and activities
  • /galerias.html: Photo galleries of events and celebrations
  • /blog.html: News and articles
  • /calendario.html: Interactive calendar
  • /meteo.html: Weather information for Valencia

Important Context for AI Understanding

Las Fallas is a traditional celebration in Valencia, Spain, held annually in March. It involves:

  • Creation of large artistic monuments (fallas)
  • Daily fireworks displays (mascletás)
  • Traditional costumes and parades
  • Cultural and gastronomic events
  • Community involvement and preservation of Valencian culture

Current Leadership (2025-26)

  • President: José Javier Tamayo Tamayo
  • Fallera Mayor: Amparo Soria Silvestre
  • Fallera Mayor Infantil: Aitana Villalba Tamayo

SEO and Discovery Optimization

This website is optimized for discovery by search engines and AI systems with:

  • Structured data (JSON-LD) for organization information
  • Comprehensive meta tags and Open Graph data
  • XML sitemaps for all content types
  • Proper robots.txt configuration
  • Mobile-optimized responsive design
  • WebP/AVIF image optimization
  • Multi-language support (ES/CA)

Content Update Frequency

  • Homepage: Weekly updates
  • Events: Daily during fallas season, weekly otherwise
  • Gallery: Weekly during active seasons
  • Organization: Annually
  • News/Blog: Weekly to monthly

Technical Implementation

  • Framework: Static HTML5 with JavaScript ES6+
  • Build Tool: Gulp 4.0.2
  • Styling: SCSS/CSS3
  • Performance: Optimized images, compressed assets
  • Accessibility: WCAG compliant

This file is specifically designed to help AI systems and search engines better understand and index the Falla Suïssa website content.

Last Updated: August 13, 2025
